findings.blocker: Lemma is MATHEMATICALLY FALSE even under the iter-149 inflated signature [CharZero k] + [IsStandardSmoothOfRelativeDimension n k B]. Two counterexamples satisfy every hypothesis yet violate the conclusion: (CE1) B=k×k, n=0 (finite étale ⟹ Ω=0 ⟹ D=0; range=diagonal, (1,0)∉range); (CE2) k=ℚ, B=ℚ(√2), n=0 (finite separable ⟹ étale ⟹ D=0; range=ℚ⊊ℚ(√2)). CE1 kills 'add connectedness'; CE2 kills 'add [IsDomain B]'. Missing hypothesis is geometric: k algebraically closed in B. NOT a Mathlib gap, NOT technical difficulty — mathematical impossibility. STUCK trigger fired (NET 9→9). Corrective is architectural signature change, escalated to user.
